thesis.question: What kinds of future work or next steps does the thesis suggest?
thesis.query_used: What kinds of future work or next steps does the thesis suggest? future directions recommendations limitations follow-up research
query_variants: What kinds of future work or next steps does the thesis suggest?
What kinds of future work or next steps does the thesis suggest? future work recommendations discussion conclusion
What kinds of future work or next steps does the thesis suggest? future directions recommendations limitations follow-up research
thesis.answer_preview:
Future work includes reader comparison studies, integrating the model into clinical decision-support workflows, engaging regulatory pathways, and pilot screening studies for the biomarker model in high-risk populations [Source 3].

References:
- [1] Final_Thesis_Leander_Antony_A.pdf - Page 96
- [2] Final_Thesis_Leander_Antony_A.pdf - Page 90
- [3]
thesis.note: The thesis explicitly lists these as future work in the recommendations section and says they are part of moving from validation to clinical integration [Source 1][Source 3].

pancreas8.answer_preview:
The paper focuses on multimodal data fusion for cancer biomarker discovery using deep learning [Source 1].

References:
- [1] pancreas8.pdf - Page 1
- [2] pancreas8.pdf - Page 1
- [3] pancreas8.pdf - Page 2
- [4] pancreas8.pdf - Page 8
pancreas8.note: The title and abstract state that it addresses integrating multiple biomedical data modalities for cancer biomarker discovery and discusses challenges and opportunities for deep learning-based multimodal fusion [Source 1, Source 2].
